---
title: "Week 15"
subtitle: "Extremist Politics"
editor: visual
---

::: callout-important
- Exam 3 (750-1000 word reflection paper) released Thursday, April 23, due Monday, April 27. 
- Exam 3 is an in-class optional assignment. You can work on it in class on Thursday during the originally scheduled exam period or do it as a takehome assignment. 
:::

::: callout-important
Project Assignment 3 (Final Research Paper) is due on Sunday, May 3 at 11:59 p.m. 
:::

## Readings

📖 John Judis, [*The Politics of Our Time*](https://www-jstor-org.proxygw.wrlc.org/stable/j.ctv2dzzqsn)

## Slides

🖥️ [Extremist politics](/slides/lecture-13.2.html)

## Assignments

📘 Exam 3

✍️ [Project Assignment 3](/project/project-assignment-3.html)

<br><br>

::: {style="font-size: 0.875em;"}
Back to [course schedule](/ "Course schedule") ⏎
:::
